mapper.sql: m.messageId, m.deviceId, d.deviceName, m.sender, m.message, m.tokens, m.sttDuration, m.ttsDuration, m.ttfsTime, m.responseTime, m.audioPath, m.state, m.messageType, m.toolCalls, m.sessionId, m.roleId, r.roleName, m.createTime, m.updateTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_message m LEFT JOIN sys_device d ON m.deviceId = d.deviceId LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON m.roleId = r.roleId
ORDER BY m.createTime DESC, m.sender DESC
